name: claude-diagnostics-bridge
description: Exports VS Code Problems panel diagnostics to a JSON file for Claude Code to read.
author: Romain Rytter

claudeDiagnostics.outputPath.markdownDescription: Where diagnostics are written. **Empty** (default) writes to a per-workspace file under `~/.claude/diagnostics/`, keeping repositories clean. An **absolute** path is used as-is. A **relative** path resolves against the workspace folder.

claudeDiagnostics.minSeverity.description: Lowest severity to include in the exported file.

claudeDiagnostics.debounceMs.description: How long to wait after diagnostics change before writing.

claudeDiagnostics.maxProblems.description: Cap on exported problems. Truncation is reported in the file.

claudeDiagnostics.warmupInclude.markdownDescription: Glob of files loaded by **Warm Up Project Diagnostics**. Narrow it to the languages you lint, e.g. `**/*.{php,ts,js}`, to make the pass much faster.

claudeDiagnostics.warmupExclude.markdownDescription: Glob excluded from the warm-up pass. Applied on top of your `files.exclude` and `search.exclude` settings, which are always honoured.

claudeDiagnostics.warmupMaxFiles.description: File count above which the warm-up asks before proceeding. It never truncates silently.

claudeDiagnostics.warmupRespectGitignore.markdownDescription: Skip files matched by `.gitignore` (and `.git/info/exclude`) during the warm-up. VS Code's file search does **not** honour `.gitignore` on its own, so without this the pass loads build output, caches, and vendored code, and reports their problems as if they were yours. Turn off to analyse ignored files too.

claudeDiagnostics.warmupSettleTimeoutMs.markdownDescription: How long **Warm Up Project Diagnostics** keeps files loaded while waiting for language servers to finish. The pass ends once diagnostics stop arriving; this is the upper bound for slow servers on large projects. Files are released afterwards, so a timeout is reported rather than hidden.

enumDescriptions: Icon plus the current minimum severity.
claudeDiagnostics.statusBarDisplay.description: What the status bar item displays.

commands.title: Claude Diagnostics: Warm Up Project Diagnostics

scripts.vscode:prepublish: npm run compile && npm run bundle-mcp
